classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是工程图右侧的'Technical Data'规格表，包含电机极数、额定功率、额定转矩、重量、防护等级、环境条件和安装条件等整机参数；未出现坐标曲线或连接器针脚定义。在给定类别中最接近机械图纸信息表，故归入机械尺寸类。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是三列表格，表头为'引脚号'、'颜色'、'内容'，逐行给出1至7号引脚与线色及功能的对应关系，其中包含'PE'、'U'、'V'、'W'等动力相线和保护地定义；在完整标注图中该区域位于左上角并对应旁边的'Power Connector'说明，因此属于动力连接器引脚定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域显示圆形连接器端面外形、孔位编号1至7及型号'YL2207ZJ-D'，但未在该区域内给出针脚功能、线色或接线对应关系，因此按连接器物理外形与位置示意归入机械尺寸类。

title.title_zh: 动力连接器外形针位图

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: Text not visible in provided image

drawing_metadata.authority: IMAGE 1 only for text and coordinates

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly including symbols, numbers, and Chinese characters
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: Millimeters assumed for mechanical connectors unless otherwise marked

dimension_records.engineering_note: Circular 7-pin power connector, manufacturer part number
Sequential numbering visible on connector face, circular pattern arrangement

mounting_interface.zh: 本区域未显示安装接口信息
mounting_interface.en: No mounting interface information visible in this region

shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 本区域未显示轴和键接口信息
shaft_and_key_interface.en: No shaft and key interface information visible in this region

overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 本区域显示圆形7针电源连接器YL2207ZJ-D的端面视图，针脚按圆周排列，编号1-7。未标注外形尺寸或间隙要求
overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: Region shows face view of circular 7-pin power connector YL2207ZJ-D with pins arranged in circular pattern, numbered 1-7. No envelope dimensions or clearance requirements marked

connector_considerations.zh: 电源连接器型号YL2207ZJ-D，7针圆形布局。针脚编号清晰标识。未显示配合尺寸、键位或防误插特征
connector_considerations.en: Power connector model YL2207ZJ-D, 7-pin circular layout. Pin numbering clearly identified. Mating dimensions, keying features, or anti-rotation details not shown

missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 缺少连接器外径、针脚直径、针脚间距、配合深度、键位方向等关键尺寸。需参考完整图纸或制造商规格书
missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Missing connector outer diameter, pin diameter, pin pitch, mating depth, keying orientation, and other critical dimensions. Refer to complete drawing or manufacturer datasheet

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为电机'Tecnical Data'参数表，包含极数、额定功率、扭矩、转速、电流、转动惯量、径向力、轴向力、重量、防护等级等整机机械与性能规格；没有坐标曲线，也没有连接器针脚定义，因此在给定类别中最接近机械尺寸/整机规格类。

regions.group_name: 电机前端外形与连接器位置

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为电机法兰正视外形及连接器安装位置图，包含安装孔标注'4-Φ9'、外形尺寸'110'、角度'45°'、孔距/圆周尺寸'Φ130±0.1'以及连接器型号'YL2207ZJ-D'、'YL2217ZJ'，未给出针脚功能或接线定义，故归入机械尺寸。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected '130±0' to 'Φ130±0.1' based on visual inspection showing diameter symbol and complete tolerance visible in image
Added degree symbol to '45' based on context showing angular dimension
Corrected '4-9' to '4-Φ9' based on visual inspection showing diameter symbol for bolt circle pattern

terminology_notes: YL2207ZJ-D and YL2217ZJ appear to be connector model designations
translation_notes: Diameter symbols corrected where OCR misread them

dimension_records.reason: Connector model designation at top of drawing
Bolt circle diameter for mounting flange with tight tolerance
Angular position of upper-left mounting hole relative to horizontal centerline
Angular position of lower-left mounting hole relative to horizontal centerline
Four mounting holes with 9mm diameter on bolt circle
Connector model designation at bottom of drawing

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Square flange 110mm with 4 mounting holes Φ9 on Φ130±0.1 bolt circle, positioned at 45° intervals
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Two connectors labeled YL2207ZJ-D (upper) and YL2217ZJ (lower)
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Connector dimensions, mounting hole depth/thread specifications, flange thickness not visible in this region

unresolved_items.reason: Duplicate/competing reading of same dimension as ocr_003; lower confidence and incomplete compared to '130±0.1' reading
unresolved_items.disposition: Rejected in favor of ocr_003 which shows complete tolerance specification

unresolved_items.reason: Isolated digit with no clear engineering context; may be OCR artifact or partial reading within '4-Φ9' callout area
unresolved_items.disposition: Unable to reliably associate with any dimension; excluded from final output

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是电机侧视外形与轴端结构尺寸图，包含轴长'41±1'、机身长度'202±1'、最大高度'180 (MAX)'、键槽'KEY'、螺纹型号'CM6L25'及多个直径和长度标注，没有针脚功能表或扭矩转速坐标曲线，因此归入机械尺寸。

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected $ to Φ and reconstructed tolerance format
Corrected leading 1 to Φ and reconstructed tolerance format

terminology_notes: Φ symbol corrected from OCR misrecognition of $ and leading 1
CM6L25 is a key standard designation, not a dimension

dimension_records.reason: Visible dimension line indicating shaft extension length
Keyway width dimension near shaft detail
Keyway depth indicated in shaft section detail
Maximum overall height dimension on motor body
Label identifying keyway feature
Keyway length dimension near KEY label
Key standard designation, not a dimension value
Shaft mounting diameter with tolerance on motor housing
Output shaft diameter with tolerance
Edge distance for mounting flange
Mounting hole spacing dimension on bottom flange
Mounting reference dimension from shaft end
Overall length dimension of motor assembly

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Bottom mounting flange with 11 mm hole spacing, 41±1 mm reference from shaft end, total length 202±1 mm
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Output shaft Φ19 0/-0.013 mm, mounting end Φ95 0/-0.035 mm, shaft length 32 mm, keyway 6 mm wide × 9 mm deep × 3 mm long, CM6L25 key standard
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Maximum height 180 mm, total length 202±1 mm
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Top connector visible but dimensions not specified in this region
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Connector precise dimensions, mounting hole diameters, and additional flange dimensions not visible in this cropped region

unresolved_items.reason: OCR fragments from connector area with very low confidence and no clear engineering meaning - appear to be misrecognitions of connector outline, hatching, or structural elements

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内为电机性能曲线图，纵轴标注'T'并结合全图技术参数可知单位为N.m，横轴标注'n (rpm)'；图中有'Intermittent'与'Continous'两条工作区曲线，并标出19.8、6.6、2000、2850等扭矩与转速关键点，表达扭矩随转速变化关系。

text_annotations.correction_note: Misspelling in original drawing (should be Continuous)

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: N.m for torque, rpm for speed

terminology_notes: Continous is a misspelling in the original drawing

dimension_records.reason: Peak torque value for intermittent operation curve
Continuous torque rating from performance curve
Rated speed point marked on torque-speed curve

engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: This is a motor performance curve showing torque vs speed characteristics. Two operating regions are defined: Intermittent (peak torque 19.8 N.m) and Continuous (6.6 N.m). Rated speed is 2850 rpm. No dimensional data present.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内是标注为 'Feedback Connector' 的针脚分配表，包含 PIN、FUNCTION、COLOR 列，并列出 1-17 号引脚与 DC +5V、GND、A、/A、B、/B、U、/U、V、/V、Z、/Z、W、/W、NC 及线色的对应关系，属于反馈/编码器信号连接器定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
